title: Ubiquiti 42U Rack Cabinet, 1000mm, perforated door
description: Ubiquiti UACC-Rack-42U-1000-P is a 19" floor-standing rack in 42U size, delivered fully assembled and equipped with a perforated front and back door panel , which â just like the split removable side panels â can be locked to prevent unauthorized access. The door is factory-set to a left-hand orientation with the option to reverse it. With a depth of 1000 mm , the rack allows the installation of networking devices up to 877 mm deep The rack offers all the features you would expect from similar products, including front and rear opening doors, the option to anchor the rack to the floor or connect multiple racks together, leveling stands, lockable casters, and vertical cable management To ensure efficient cooling of active components, the rack is equipped with four fans. The static load capacity is 800 kg, and the rolling load capacity is up to 320 kg. The enclosure features an elegant white finish with a powder-coated surface, and the Ubiquiti logo is present on the side panels. Cable entry points covered with blanking plates are available on the bottom, top, and rear sides of the rack 19" Rack (3) Keys GPSR Technical support for this product is available on [email protected] email or sending a request via web form . Our technical support is available during this business hours
